name: Game Over Please
short_description: Simple like the old days: move, fail, try again. A straight, old-school challenge — tough, honest, and addictive.
detailed_description:
When games were about skill — not shortcuts.


Remember when games didn’t hook you with story, but with challenge? Game Over Please was born from that spirit.


No long tutorials. No checkpoints. No mercy. Just you, the mouse, and 95 levels that demand precision and patience in true arcade fashion.


Every mistake is quick. Every success feels earned. That’s what makes it impossible to stop.


The gameplay is simple, but the execution is unforgiving — just like the classics.


Clean visuals, fair physics, and a minimal soundtrack create a rhythm of trial and error where progress comes through skill, not luck.


If you miss the time when games were about mastering control — not just winning — this is your proving ground.


  • 95 handcrafted levels: A steady climb in difficulty and precision challenges.

  • Pure arcade focus: Simple controls, no distractions.

  • Fair, tough gameplay: Every failure teaches; every victory is earned.

  • Retro atmosphere: Minimal art and sound for that old-school tension.

No tricks. No excuses. Just skill.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Arabic, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Spanish - Spain, Hebrew, Czech, Dutch, Greek, Thai, Spanish - Latin America
